title: Handoff object (Chapter 8.5)
description: What one subagent hands to the next: the target, a summary of completed work, the artifact references that support it, and any unresolved questions. Deliberately compact — never a full conversational transcript.

target.description: The agent, subagent, or workflow stage receiving this handoff.

completed_work.description: One-sentence summary of what was done, not a transcript of how.

supporting_artifacts.description: References the receiving party can look up directly — evidence_ids, signal_ids, hypothesis_ids, or output file paths — never inlined full content.

unresolved_questions.description: Anything the sending agent could not confirm or resolve, including unresolved conflicting-evidence pairs (Ch. 7.5). An empty array means genuinely none, not an unreported gap.
